en: Let me tell you, this is what I think marriage is for a man, okay?
You show up at the end of a pier
with your one piece of luggage
that your wife lets you bring into the marriage.
That's all you get, is whatever can fit in that piece of luggage.
That's all you get to bring as a man
And you'll bargain with her, you'll try to talk about it before you get married,
and you move over and make a house for yourselves.
You're like, what? Hey, can I bring that pool table?
Oh yeah, if you can fit in that bag.
